chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2086 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8467/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8244/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 Petitioner Syed Shayan Ali Shah present in person does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that he will file afresh petition after curing the defects. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
